requirement_topic.en: ZETDC Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, ZERA Licensing, and Net-Metering Registration
requirement_topic.zh: ZETDC BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933、ZERA许可及净计量注册
requirement_topic.zht: ZETDC BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933、ZERA許可及淨計量注冊

summary.en: The Zimbabwe Electricity Transmission and Distribution Company (ZETDC), a subsidiary of ZESA Holdings, is the sole national transmission and distribution utility in Zimbabwe. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale, C&I behind-the-meter, and solar-plus-storage systems — require a ZETDC grid-connection agreement and technical approval before commissioning. The Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority (ZERA), established under the Energy Regulatory Authority Act (Chapter 13:23), regulates all electricity generation and storage activities; operators must obtain a ZERA generation/storage licence and, for grid-tied solar-plus-storage systems, register under ZERA's net-metering framework. Zimbabwe's grid operates at 230 V single-phase and 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz — differing from China's 220/380 V configuration. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Zimbabwe's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid parameters. Grid-connection technical specifications for BESS are defined in ZETDC connection agreements; project teams should engage ZETDC at the earliest project stage. IEC 62933 series (including IEC 62933-5-2 safety requirements and IEC 62933-2-1 unit parameters) is the internationally expected technical reference for BESS grid integration and may be referenced in ZETDC or project-owner specifications.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦电力输配电公司（ZETDC）是ZESA控股的子公司，是津巴布韦唯一的国家输配电公用事业机构。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、工商业表后系统和光储一体化系统——在调试前均须取得ZETDC并网协议和技术批准。津巴布韦能源监管局（ZERA）依据《能源监管局法》（第13:23章）设立，监管所有电力发电和储能活动；运营商须取得ZERA发电/储能许可，对于并网光储系统还须在ZERA净计量框架下进行注册。津巴布韦电网运行参数为单相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——与中国220/380 V配置不同。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数进行设计、配置和验证。BESS并网技术规格在ZETDC并网协议中规定；项目团队应在项目最早阶段与ZETDC接触。IEC 62933系列（包括IEC 62933-5-2安全要求和IEC 62933-2-1单元参数）是BESS并网整合的国际预期技术参考，可能在ZETDC或项目业主规格中被引用。
summary.zht: 辛巴威電力輸配電公司（ZETDC）是ZESA控股的子公司，是辛巴威唯一的國家輸配電公用事業機構。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、工商業表後系統和光儲一體化系統——在調試前均須取得ZETDC併網協議和技術批准。辛巴威能源監管局（ZERA）依據《能源監管局法》（第13:23章）設立，監管所有電力發電和儲能活動；運營商須取得ZERA發電/儲能許可，對於併網光儲系統還須在ZERA淨計量框架下進行注冊。辛巴威電網運行參數為單相230 V、三相400 V、50 Hz——與中國220/380 V配置不同。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數進行設計、配置和驗證。BESS併網技術規格在ZETDC併網協議中規定；項目團隊應在項目最早階段與ZETDC接觸。IEC 62933系列（包括IEC 62933-5-2安全要求和IEC 62933-2-1單元參數）是BESS併網整合的國際預期技術參考，可能在ZETDC或項目業主規格中被引用。

standards_or_laws: Zimbabwe Energy Regulatory Authority Act (Chapter 13:23) — ZERA mandate to regulate generation and storage; ZERA generation/storage licence and net-metering registration required
ZETDC Grid Connection Agreement — technical requirements for all grid-connected BESS in Zimbabwe; obtain directly from ZETDC
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Zimbabwe grid parameters: 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Zimbabwe's 230/400 V. PCS firmware and protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Zimbabwe's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions before ZETDC grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与津巴布韦230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在ZETDC并网测试和调试前重新针对津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與辛巴威230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在ZETDC併網測試和調試前重新針對辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ZETDC's grid-connection requirements or ZERA's licensing obligations in Zimbabwe. Key gaps requiring attention: (a) ZERA generation/storage licence — mandatory before operating any grid-connected BESS in Zimbabwe; engage ZERA at the earliest project stage; (b) ZERA net-metering registration — required for grid-tied solar-plus-storage systems exporting to ZETDC's network; (c) grid voltage — Zimbabwe is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and inverter firmware must be reconfigured and retested for Zimbabwe's grid; (d) ZETDC connection agreement — engage ZETDC to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (e) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications reference IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (f) mining captive systems — BESS at mining sites (gold, platinum, lithium) must also comply with Ministry of Mines (MHTE) mining regulations for captive power systems.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足津巴布韦ZETDC并网要求或ZERA许可义务。需注意的主要差距：（a）ZERA发电/储能许可——在津巴布韦运营任何并网BESS前必须取得；应在项目最早阶段与ZERA接触；（b）ZERA净计量注册——向ZETDC电网输出电力的并网光储系统须进行注册；（c）电网电压——津巴布韦为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数和逆变器固件须重新配置并针对津巴布韦电网重新测试；（d）ZETDC并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前与ZETDC接触以获取技术要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（f）矿业自备系统——矿业（金、铂、锂）现场的BESS还须遵守矿产及矿业开发部（MHTE）关于自备电力系统的矿业法规。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足辛巴威ZETDC併網要求或ZERA許可義務。需注意的主要差距：（a）ZERA發電/儲能許可——在辛巴威運營任何併網BESS前必須取得；應在項目最早階段與ZERA接觸；（b）ZERA淨計量注冊——向ZETDC電網輸出電力的併網光儲系統須進行注冊；（c）電網電壓——辛巴威為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數和逆變器韌體須重新配置並針對辛巴威電網重新測試；（d）ZETDC併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前與ZETDC接觸以獲取技術要求；（e）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格引用IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（f）礦業自備系統——礦業（金、鉑、鋰）現場的BESS還須遵守礦產及礦業開發部（MHTE）關於自備電力系統的礦業法規。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ZERA generation/storage licence required before operating any grid-connected BESS in Zimbabwe; ZETDC grid-connection agreement required for all grid-tied installations; ZERA net-metering registration required for solar-plus-storage systems exporting to ZETDC network
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Zimbabwe

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Zimbabwe's ZETDC grid-connection requirements or ZERA licensing obligations. A ZERA generation/storage licence is mandatory before operating any grid-connected BESS in Zimbabwe; net-metering registration is additionally required for solar-plus-storage export systems. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Zimbabwe's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. Engage ZERA and ZETDC at the earliest project stage to determine licence requirements, connection agreement technical specifications, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol requirements before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足津巴布韦ZETDC并网要求或ZERA许可义务。在津巴布韦运营任何并网BESS前，ZERA发电/储能许可是强制要求；光储出口系统还须额外进行净计量注册。BESS储能变流器须重新针对津巴布韦230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应在项目最早阶段与ZERA和ZETDC接触，在设备采购最终确定前确定许可要求、并网协议技术规格、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足辛巴威ZETDC併網要求或ZERA許可義務。在辛巴威運營任何併網BESS前，ZERA發電/儲能許可是強制要求；光儲出口系統還須額外進行淨計量注冊。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對辛巴威230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應在項目最早階段與ZERA和ZETDC接觸，在設備採購最終確定前確定許可要求、併網協議技術規格、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議要求。
